tasks.title: Design AI Learning Progress Review Data Model and API
tasks.description: Define the data structures and API interfaces for the AI Learning Progress Review feature, including input parameters (date range), user study data aggregation (lessons, skills, vocabulary, mistakes, consistency), and output report schema with all required sections (summary, improvements, struggles, repeated mistakes, vocabulary review, skill progress, study plan adherence, recommendations, tutor feedback). Create TypeScript interfaces in packages/learning-engine/src/progress/AIProgressReview.ts and update relevant service interfaces.
acceptanceCriteria: Data model covers all required report sections
API interfaces support date range input and return structured report
TypeScript interfaces are syntactically correct
tasks.expectedResult: AI Learning Progress Review data model and API interfaces are defined and ready for implementation

outputPlan.description: TypeScript interfaces and types for AI Learning Progress Review feature

metadata.inputContext: Project feature requirements and existing progress data models
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the foundational data structures and API contract for the AI Learning Progress Review feature

tasks.title: Implement AIProgressReviewService to Aggregate User Study Data
tasks.description: Create AIProgressReviewService in packages/learning-engine/src/progress/AIProgressReviewService.ts that aggregates user study data for a given date range. It should collect completed lessons, practiced skills sessions, saved vocabulary entries, mistake records, study consistency metrics, and weak areas using existing services (ProgressService, WeaknessDetectionService, VocabularyService). The service should prepare data for AI analysis and report generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Service correctly fetches and aggregates all required user study data for specified date range
Integration with existing services is implemented
Service methods have unit tests covering data aggregation logic
tasks.expectedResult: AIProgressReviewService implemented and tested to provide aggregated user study data for AI analysis

outputPlan.description: Service to aggregate user study data for AI Learning Progress Review

metadata.inputContext: AI Learning Progress Review data model and existing progress-related services
evidence: file exists: AIProgressReviewService.ts and test file
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides aggregated user study data needed for AI analysis and report generation

tasks.title: Create AI Prompt Builder for Learning Progress Review Report
tasks.description: Implement a prompt builder function in packages/ai-tutor/src/prompts/learningProgressReview.ts that formats the aggregated user study data into a structured prompt for the AI Tutor. The prompt should instruct the AI to act as a real IELTS tutor and generate the detailed progress report including all required sections. Include system prompt, user prompt templates, and JSON schema for expected AI response.
acceptanceCriteria: Prompt builder produces well-structured prompt with all required data and instructions
Prompt includes clear instructions for AI to generate all report sections
JSON schema for AI response is defined and exported
tasks.expectedResult: AI prompt builder for learning progress review is implemented and ready for AI calls

outputPlan.description: Prompt builder and JSON schema for AI Learning Progress Review report generation

metadata.inputContext: Aggregated user study data from AIProgressReviewService
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables AI Tutor to generate detailed learning progress review reports

tasks.title: Implement AIProgressReviewController to Call AI Tutor and Parse Report
tasks.description: Create AIProgressReviewController in packages/ai-tutor/src/controllers/AIProgressReviewController.ts that uses AIProgressReviewService to get user data, calls AI Tutor with the prompt builder, and parses the AI response into structured report data. Handle errors and fallback gracefully. Export controller for use by UI components.
acceptanceCriteria: Controller correctly calls AI Tutor with prompt and receives response
Response is parsed and validated against JSON schema
Errors are handled and logged
Controller has unit tests covering main flows
tasks.expectedResult: AIProgressReviewController implemented and tested to provide AI-generated progress reports

outputPlan.description: Controller to orchestrate AI calls for learning progress review

metadata.inputContext: AIProgressReviewService, AI prompt builder, AI Tutor client
evidence: file exists: AIProgressReviewController.ts and test file
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the backend logic to generate AI-powered learning progress reports

tasks.title: Design AI Learning Progress Review UI Components
tasks.description: Design React UI components under apps/web/src/features/progressReview/components/ to display the AI Learning Progress Review report. Components include date range selector, loading state, error state, and detailed report sections: overall summary, improvements, struggles, repeated mistakes, vocabulary review, skill progress, study plan adherence, recommendations, and tutor feedback. Follow existing UI style and accessibility guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: UI components cover all report sections
Components are responsive and accessible
Design matches project style conventions
tasks.expectedResult: UI components designed and implemented to render AI Learning Progress Review reports

outputPlan.description: Main panel component for AI Learning Progress Review
Date range selector component for report period

metadata.inputContext: AI Learning Progress Review report data structure and UI style guidelines
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the user interface for users to view their AI-generated learning progress reports

tasks.title: Implement ProgressReviewFeature Module and Integrate AI Controller
tasks.description: Create a new feature module apps/web/src/features/progressReview/ that includes hooks, services, and components for the AI Learning Progress Review feature. Implement a hook useProgressReview that calls AIProgressReviewController to fetch and manage report data. Integrate the ProgressReviewPanel component to display the report. Add routing to /progress-review in the app router to access this feature.
acceptanceCriteria: Feature module encapsulates all logic and UI for progress review
Hook correctly fetches and manages AI report data
Route /progress-review is accessible and renders the report panel
Feature integrates with AIProgressReviewController
tasks.expectedResult: AI Learning Progress Review feature module implemented and integrated into app routing

outputPlan.description: Feature module entry point exporting components and hooks
Hook to fetch and manage AI progress review report data
Add route /progress-review for AI Learning Progress Review feature

metadata.inputContext: AIProgressReviewController, UI components for progress review, app routing
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Integrates AI Learning Progress Review into the web app with routing and data fetching

tasks.title: Add Unit and Integration Tests for Progress Review Feature
tasks.description: Write comprehensive unit tests for all new services, controllers, hooks, and components related to the AI Learning Progress Review feature. Include integration tests to verify end-to-end data flow from user input (date range) through AI call to report rendering. Use testing libraries consistent with the project. Place tests under appropriate __tests__ folders.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover all new code with >80% coverage
Integration tests verify correct report rendering with mocked AI responses
Tests pass without errors
tasks.expectedResult: All new code for AI Learning Progress Review feature is well tested with passing tests

outputPlan.description: Unit and integration tests for ProgressReviewPanel component

metadata.inputContext: All new feature code for AI Learning Progress Review
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures reliability and correctness of the AI Learning Progress Review feature

tasks.title: Perform Accessibility and UX Review of Progress Review UI
tasks.description: Conduct an accessibility audit and UX review of the AI Learning Progress Review UI components and pages. Verify keyboard navigation, screen reader support, color contrast, and responsiveness. Adjust components and styles as needed to meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards and project UX guidelines. Document any changes made.
acceptanceCriteria: UI components pass accessibility checks
UX is intuitive and responsive on desktop and mobile
No critical accessibility issues remain

metadata.inputContext: Implemented UI components for AI Learning Progress Review
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves usability and accessibility of the AI Learning Progress Review feature

tasks.description: Create a new documentation section in docs/features.md and docs/user-guide.md describing the AI Learning Progress Review feature. Include how to access the feature, select date ranges, interpret the report sections, and use the tutor-style feedback. Provide screenshots or UI mockups if available.

Includes all report sections and their meanings
